title: senna heptanthera
intro: Senna heptanthera, also known as the yellow senna or senna heptanthera, is a perennial shrub native to tropical Africa. This plant is a member of the legume family and has been used for its medicinal properties, including laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. Senna heptanthera is often used to treat constipation, as it contains anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of senna heptanthera include tea, capsules, and tinctures, and should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential side effects.
